name: Modest Explorer
description: The Modest Explorer is a van designed to get you out of the house and into nature. This beauty is equipped with solar panels, a composting toilet, a water tank and kitchenette. The idea is that you can pack up your home and escape for a weekend or even longer!

name: Beach Bum
description: Built for the endless summer. This high-roof layout features integrated surfboard racks and a waterproof interior, making it the ultimate basecamp for those who live by the tide.

name: Reliable Red
description: A heavy-duty classic with a bulletproof diesel engine. No flashy tech here—just pure mechanical reliability and enough torque to pull a house. If you need to get there every single time, this is the one.

name: Dreamfinder
description: The mobile command center for the modern explorer. Equipped with a built-in Starlink mount, lithium-ion battery array, and a minimalist workspace designed for deep-focus coding under the stars.

name: The Cruiser
description: A sleek, long-wheelbase grand tourer. Tuned for maximum comfort and fuel efficiency on cross-continent journeys. It’s less of a vehicle and more of a private lounge on wheels.

name: Green Wonder
description: The invisible camper. Featuring a stealth-black solar roof and reclaimed timber interior, this van is designed to blend into the forest while providing a zero-emissions living experience.
